name: AfCFTA Compliance RAG Evaluation Set
notes: This set is designed for citation-first RAG evaluation before production launch.
Expected citation targets are intentionally document-family oriented because the final uploaded corpus is not yet fixed.
Replace placeholder document names with exact uploaded filenames and section IDs during ingestion.

cases.question: What is AfCFTA and which types of trade does it cover for goods moving between African member states?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Summarize AfCFTA at a high level, limit claims to covered trade in goods, and mention that implementation depends on ratification and domestic schedules where relevant.
failure_modes: Answers from general web knowledge instead of uploaded documents
Claims all African countries apply the same rules immediately

cases.question: Does AfCFTA automatically make all products duty free today?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer no, explain tariff liberalization phases and exclusions or sensitive categories if documented.
expected_citation_targets: National tariff offer or category schedule

cases.question: Is Ethiopia currently trading under the same AfCFTA tariff preferences as Kenya for all products?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Explain differences by national schedule, implementation status, and product coverage; do not imply uniform treatment.

cases.question: Which document in our corpus should be treated as the source of truth when treaty text and a local customs notice conflict?
cases.expected_answer_summary: State the hierarchy only if the uploaded documents define it; otherwise explain the conflict and ask for legal or customs confirmation.

cases.question: Est-ce que l'AfCFTA supprime immediatement tous les droits de douane pour les marchandises eligibles ?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Provide a French answer grounded in schedule-based liberalization and explain that preferences depend on the applicable tariff offer and origin qualification.

cases.question: What is the applicable AfCFTA tariff rate in 2028 for HS 0207 in Ethiopia if it appears in Category A?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Look up the specific schedule entry, return the 2028 rate, and cite the exact schedule row or section.
failure_modes: Uses a general category description instead of the exact row

cases.question: How does the tariff rate for a Category A product change from 2026 to 2030 in the uploaded schedule?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Summarize year-by-year rate progression using cited schedule evidence.
failure_modes: Gives generic percentages without citing the actual schedule
Misses that different products may have different base rates

cases.question: If a product is not listed in our Category A schedule, can the assistant conclude that it is not AfCFTA-eligible?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer cautiously, explain the limit of the uploaded schedule, and avoid overclaiming without a full schedule corpus.

cases.question: What should the assistant say if the user asks for the tariff rate for a year not present in the uploaded schedule?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Refuse to guess and state that the uploaded evidence only supports the listed years.
failure_modes: Uses training data instead of uploaded evidence

cases.question: Je, kiwango cha ushuru wa AfCFTA kwa bidhaa hii katika mwaka 2029 kinaonyeshwa vipi kwenye ratiba ya nchi husika?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer in Swahili if possible, explain the 2029 rate from the cited national schedule, and avoid unsupported translation of legal terms.

cases.question: Where in the corpus can I verify whether a Kenyan EAC schedule line uses the base rate or a reduced AfCFTA rate for 2027?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Point the user to the schedule row and explain the difference between base rate and annual preferential rate if documented.
failure_modes: Confuses MFN/base rate with AfCFTA preference
Does not cite the line item

cases.question: If the schedule shows percentages but the user asks for estimated duty payable, what should the assistant do?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Explain that the corpus supports the tariff rate but not the final duty payable unless customs value and other charges are supplied and documented.
expected_citation_targets: Any duty calculation guidance in corpus
failure_modes: Omits the need for customs valuation inputs

cases.question: What makes a product originating under AfCFTA according to the uploaded rules of origin documents?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Summarize the qualifying pathways only from the corpus, such as wholly obtained, substantial transformation, or product-specific rules if present.
failure_modes: Gives a generic trade-law answer with no citations

cases.question: Can imported packaging materials from outside Africa disqualify a product from AfCFTA origin?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer conditionally based on the treatment of packaging, accessories, or non-originating materials in the corpus.
expected_citation_targets: Interpretive notes on packaging or accessories

cases.question: How should the assistant answer when two uploaded rules of origin documents describe cumulation differently?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Expose the conflict, cite both sources, and avoid choosing a side without a higher-priority source in the corpus.

cases.question: What evidence is needed to support a claim that mangoes grown and harvested locally are wholly obtained?
cases.expected_answer_summary: List the documentary evidence only if the corpus covers it, otherwise explain the likely source category and note missing evidence.

cases.question: If a user asks whether simple repackaging in a free zone is enough to confer origin, how should the assistant respond?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Check insufficient processing rules and answer no unless the uploaded documents explicitly allow it.
expected_citation_targets: Free zone treatment guidance if present
failure_modes: Fails to cite the insufficient operations rule

cases.question: Quelles sont les conditions minimales pour prouver qu'un produit est d'origine preferentielle selon les regles d'origine telechargees ?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer in French, summarize only the origin pathways and proof requirements found in the uploaded corpus.
failure_modes: Mixes unsupported rules from another FTA

cases.question: Can the assistant determine origin status if the bill of materials is missing and only the product description is provided?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Explain that a definitive origin determination usually cannot be made from the provided evidence and cite why.
failure_modes: Makes a yes or no determination without data

cases.question: Where should a user look to confirm whether a product-specific rule applies instead of a general origin rule?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Direct the user to the product-specific rule annex or schedule and explain that it governs if the corpus says so.
failure_modes: Uses only general rules when a PSR exists

cases.question: What documents are required to support an AfCFTA certificate of origin claim for an export shipment?
cases.expected_answer_summary: List only the documents explicitly supported by the uploaded corpus and distinguish required from supporting evidence.
failure_modes: Does not separate mandatory and optional support

cases.question: Who is authorized to issue the certificate of origin according to the uploaded documents?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Identify the issuing authority only if named in the corpus and note any country-specific variation.

cases.question: Can a missing supplier declaration be cured after shipment according to the uploaded compliance documents?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer based on documentary correction or post-clearance provisions if present; otherwise flag that the corpus does not confirm it.
failure_modes: Confuses internal business docs with customs proof

cases.question: How should the assistant answer if the user asks for a template certificate but the uploaded corpus only contains text rules?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Explain that the corpus contains rule text, not a form template, and point the user to the relevant governing document sections.
failure_modes: Claims the form is included when it is not

cases.question: What retention period applies to origin-supporting records in the uploaded documents?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Return the exact retention period and scope if specified, otherwise say the corpus does not establish it.
failure_modes: Confuses customs record retention with business policy

cases.question: የአፍሪካ ነጻ ንግድ ስምምነት መነሻ ማረጋገጫ ለማቅረብ ምን ዓይነት ሰነዶች ያስፈልጋሉ?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer in Amharic if possible, list only the supported documentary requirements, and preserve citation clarity.

cases.question: If the user uploads an invoice and asks whether it alone proves origin, what should the assistant say?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Explain that an invoice alone usually does not establish origin unless the corpus expressly says otherwise.
failure_modes: Treats invoice as sufficient by default

cases.question: Can the assistant tell the user which documents are missing from a file set if one of the required documents is absent?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Compare the uploaded set against the required list and identify missing items only when the requirement is explicit in the corpus.
failure_modes: Marks documents missing without a defined checklist
Does not explain the basis for the missing-item list

cases.question: What country-specific evidence in our corpus applies to Ethiopia but not to Kenya for AfCFTA tariff treatment?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Identify the Ethiopia-only evidence with citations and avoid assuming the same rule applies to Kenya.
failure_modes: Generalizes one country's rules to another
Does not present the comparison explicitly

cases.question: If a user asks which schedule to trust for Kenya when both EAC and national references are uploaded, how should the assistant respond?
cases.expected_answer_summary: State the relationship only if the corpus defines it; otherwise cite both and flag the need for confirmation.
failure_modes: Assumes one automatically supersedes the other

cases.question: Can the assistant answer a Ghana question using only Ethiopia and Kenya documents?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Refuse to provide a country-specific Ghana answer and explain that the current evidence base does not include Ghana documents.

cases.question: How should the assistant handle a country-specific customs notice that is newer than the treaty commentary in the corpus?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Note the document dates, cite both sources, and prefer the newer country-specific operational guidance only if the corpus supports that interpretation.
failure_modes: Always prefers commentary over operative documents

cases.question: Les regles applicables au Kenya dans nos documents peuvent-elles etre appliquees automatiquement a un autre pays membre ?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer no unless the corpus explicitly says the rule is common across those jurisdictions.

cases.question: If a customs instruction references an annex we have not uploaded, what should the assistant do?
cases.expected_answer_summary: State that the annex is missing from the current evidence base and limit the answer accordingly.
failure_modes: Pretends to know the annex contents

cases.question: What should happen when a user asks for the nearest customs office or live filing portal?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Decline if the corpus does not contain operational contact details, or answer only from uploaded official contacts.
expected_citation_targets: Official operational contacts document if present

cases.question: What can customs verify after an AfCFTA preference claim is made according to the uploaded documents?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Summarize post-entry verification rights, document requests, and audit scope only if supported by the corpus.
failure_modes: Confuses customs verification with private certification

cases.question: Can a preference be denied after import clearance if origin evidence is later found insufficient?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer based on the corpus, cite post-clearance review or denial provisions, and avoid certainty if not stated.

cases.question: If the user asks how long customs may keep a shipment pending origin verification, what should the assistant say?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Provide the timeline only if the corpus states it, otherwise say the current evidence does not define a fixed period.

cases.question: What records should a business keep to defend an AfCFTA origin claim during an audit?
cases.expected_answer_summary: List records only from the corpus and distinguish between transactional, production, and origin-support evidence where documented.
failure_modes: Adds standard audit records not in the corpus

cases.question: Forodha wanaweza kuomba ushahidi gani baada ya dai la upendeleo wa AfCFTA kuwasilishwa?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer in Swahili if possible, keep the answer grounded in the verification provisions, and cite them clearly.

cases.question: Should the assistant answer a legal interpretation question if the uploaded documents only contain tariff schedules and no legal text?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Refuse or narrowly answer from schedules only, while stating the legal interpretation evidence is missing.
expected_citation_targets: Corpus coverage or retrieved schedule excerpts
failure_modes: Answers broad legal questions from thin evidence

cases.question: What should the assistant do if retrieved chunks disagree on whether a product is eligible?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Surface the disagreement, cite both chunks, and recommend manual review instead of producing a single unsupported answer.

cases.question: If a user asks for advice on how to avoid customs scrutiny, how should the assistant respond?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Decline and redirect to compliant documentation and process requirements if such material exists in the corpus.
expected_citation_targets: Operational or ethical use policy if present

cases.question: What should happen if the source document is OCR-corrupted and the tariff percentage is unreadable?
cases.expected_answer_summary: State that the evidence is unreadable or low-confidence and avoid returning a numeric value.

cases.question: Que doit faire l'assistant si les documents telecharges ne couvrent pas le produit ou le pays demande ?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer in French and clearly state that the current corpus does not support a grounded answer for that product or country.
failure_modes: Fails to state the coverage gap

cases.question: When the assistant says a product qualifies, what exact citation format should it provide?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Return the document title plus article, section, annex, page, or schedule line whenever available in metadata.
failure_modes: Gives vague citations such as only the document name
Provides no page or section when metadata exists

cases.question: How should the assistant cite evidence when the answer depends on two separate documents?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Present both citations and explain which part of the answer each citation supports.
failure_modes: Does not map claim to source

cases.question: If the chunk contains a schedule row but no article number, what should the citation include?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Use the strongest available locator such as schedule name, row label, HS code, and page number.

cases.question: ምላሹ በሁለት ሰነዶች ላይ ቢመሰረት ማጣቀሻዎቹን እንዴት ማቅረብ አለበት?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer in Amharic if possible and keep both citations visible and attributable to separate claims.
failure_modes: Combines two sources into one vague reference

cases.question: What should the assistant do when it can answer only part of the user's question from the uploaded evidence?
cases.expected_answer_summary: Answer the supported portion, cite it, and explicitly mark the unsupported portion as unverified in the current corpus.
failure_modes: Fails to separate verified from unverified content
